---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest something new
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**The problem**
What aren't you able to do today?

**The proposed solution**
One paragraph. Skip the implementation details unless you've already thought about them.

**Alternatives**
What you considered and rejected, briefly.

**Scope check**
- [ ] This doesn't require the app to make outbound network connections.
- [ ] This doesn't require sandbox-blocked APIs (would break our `nettop` access).
- [ ] This doesn't add telemetry.

If any are unchecked, please explain why this is still worth doing.
